The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on cardiovascular conditions and other unrelated health issues. While the patient has a history of coronary atherosclerosis and is on various medications, there is no mention of lipid levels, lipid disorders, or ongoing management of such conditions. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not possible to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the next hospital visit.
